failures.description: The agent failed by planning and executing a catalog search that did not filter for available items despite the user's explicit 'available' constraint.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user goal was to identify the cheapest available Jigsaw Puzzle. The agent understood the goal, but at index 1 it planned a ProductCatalogSearch query with available_only=false even though the task specifically required an available item and enough information was already present to filter available products. This led the subsequent tool call to include unavailable products, deviating from the required action sequence, even though the final answer happened to select the correct available item.
